title: Bronze Ding Atlas
description: A reference-dependent museum atlas: one bronze ding reference followed by exploded, casting-layer, and bilingual plate views that preserve the same artifact identity.
creative_direction: This package treats one ritual bronze ding as a stable museum object. Image 01 establishes silhouette, patina, ornament, and proportions; images 02-04 use it as reference for increasingly technical exploded views and bilingual annotations.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Bronze Ding Atlas
en.description: One bronze ding reference expands into exploded, casting-layer, and bilingual museum plate views.

zh-CN.title: 青铜鼎图鉴系列
zh-CN.description: 一件青铜鼎从参考图扩展为爆炸图、铸造层图和中英双语馆藏图版。
